title: Natural health product licensing - Canada.ca
content:
## Natural health product licensing
Information on applying for a natural health product licence, including access to ingredient and licence databases.

## Services and information

### Licensed Natural Health Product Database
Search for product names, licence holders, licensed product numbers, medicinal ingredients, dosage forms, recommended use or purpose, and related risks.

### Guidance documents on natural health product regulatory requirements
Learn about regulatory requirements for natural health products, including advertising, clinical trials, compliance, adverse reaction reporting, and product and site licensing.

### Natural Health Products Ingredients Database
Browse this database for approved medicinal and non-medicinal ingredients, and monograph and labelling standards.

### Natural health product on-line solution
Use tools to help draft and process your natural health product licence application.

### Natural Health Product Licensing Bulletin
Browse this database for announcements of product licensing changes or reminders of regulatory changes.
